# Howard Kessler,DC — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A chiropractic practice based at 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, serving a broad and diverse patient base throughout Bergen County. The practice welcomes everyone from young patients (age 10) to seniors (age 100), including weekend athletes and working professionals. The brand has a community-centered, inclusive feel — approachable yet professional, focused on helping people of all ages and lifestyles feel their best.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app
Your trusted chiropractor in Bergen County NJ, serving ages 10 to 100 with personalized care. Find lasting back pain relief and renewed vitality. Book your visit today.

### Services
https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app/services
Expert chiropractic services in Bergen County, from spinal decompression for herniated discs to sports injury treatment. Tailored care that gets you back to your best self.

### About
https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app/about
Meet Howard Kessler, DC, a Bergen County chiropractor dedicated to inclusive, community-focused care for weekend athletes, professionals, and seniors alike. Learn our story.

### Contact
https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to feel your best? Contact our Bergen County chiropractic office on Broadway in Hillsdale, NJ. Schedule your appointment and take the first step toward a pain-free life.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Howard Kessler,DC
A chiropractic practice based at 230 Broadway, Hillsdale, NJ, serving a broad and diverse patient base throughout Bergen County. The practice welcomes everyone from young patients (age 10) to seniors (age 100), including weekend athletes and working professionals. The brand has a community-centered, inclusive feel — approachable yet professional, focused on helping people of all ages and lifestyles feel their best.

## Target Audience
- Patients across Bergen County, NJ — ranging from weekend athletes to working professionals and all walks of life, ages 10 to 100
- Weekend Athletes
- Working Professionals
- Active Seniors
- Youth Athletes
- Health-Conscious Parents

## Industry
Healthcare / Chiropractic

- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://howard-kessler-dc-3b04e7d3.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
